---
title: "#database"
format: gfm
---


## 2020-11-04

*05:57:37 - @Kevin Rue-Albrecht has joined the channel*
**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (05:57:38):
> set the channel description: Working with databases in R

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (05:58:42):
> In case anyone works with SQLite databases, I'm happy to get feedback about[https://github.com/kevinrue/sqlighter](https://github.com/kevinrue/sqlighter)It's by no mean groundbreaking, as it says on the tin:
> > Convenient wrapper functions around the RSQLite package


## 2020-12-12

*00:40:23 - @Huipeng Li has joined the channel*

## 2021-01-22

*15:43:35 - @Annajiat Alim Rasel has joined the channel*

## 2021-02-17

*16:06:11 - @abdullah hanta has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-20

*01:57:19 - @watanabe_st has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-11

*16:44:46 - @Megha Lal has joined the channel*

## 2021-06-04

*08:56:25 - @Izaskun Mallona has joined the channel*

## 2021-07-23

*15:52:40 - @Batool Almarzouq has joined the channel*

## 2021-11-08

*03:26:37 - @Paula Nieto García has joined the channel*

## 2021-12-07

*15:20:46 - @Jenny Smith has joined the channel*

## 2022-01-28

*11:12:26 - @Megha Lal has left the channel*

## 2022-07-28

*13:52:17 - @Krithika Bhuvanesh has joined the channel*

## 2022-07-31

*04:14:33 - @Arda Keles has joined the channel*

## 2022-12-12

*17:58:04 - @Lexi Bounds has joined the channel*

## 2023-01-18

*13:09:33 - @José Basílio has joined the channel*

## 2023-01-21

*16:02:01 - @Hien has joined the channel*
*16:17:25 - @Hien has left the channel*

## 2023-03-31

*08:34:09 - @Aedin Culhane has joined the channel*

## 2023-05-03

*16:15:35 - @Rebecca Butler has joined the channel*

## 2024-02-05

*17:27:20 - @Manuel Barrios Izás has joined the channel*

## 2024-03-26

*16:08:39 - @Sara m.morsy has joined the channel*

## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (10:23:37):
> archived the channel
